contributor: mississippi department of archives and history
description: AT Professor Granted Leave For Assignment With World Health Organization Greensboro N CA profes sor at AT College has been granted a leave of absence for work on a foreign assignment Dr Randa D Russell profes sor and chairman Womens Physical Education Department since 1952 has been granted a leave to accept an appointment as health education advisor to the World Health Organization with headquarters at Geneva Switzerland Announcement of the appoint ment and approval for leave was made this week by Dr L C Dowdy acting president at the college He said that Dr Rus sel will leave the United States in midSeptember Dr Russell will serve as health education advisor in the Phillipines and will be station ed at Manila She will advise and assist the Phillipine Government and co operating agencies in the imple mentation of the School Health Education Project render ad visory and consultation services to the Phillipines Department i 11 of Education and the Depart ment of Health for strengthen ing the total school health pro grams and to make recommen dations for immediate and long term improvements in school health education including the preparation of appropriate health and educational personnel for the work
